# page-foundry

> page-foundry is an open-source Claude Code skill: a gated pipeline that turns one product brief into one finished marketing page, in your own voice, built so it does not read or look AI-made.

It runs every homepage, landing page, and sales page through seven build phases (preflight, intake, message architecture, page spec, copy, design, build) and eight ship gates (conversion audit, voice scan, accessibility, performance, render review, AI discovery, measurement, integrity). A page that fails a gate does not ship. Copy is written in the owner's voice and checked by a standard-library Python scanner whose rules live in an editable file. The integrity gate forbids fabricated testimonials, logos, and numbers.

## Built with page-foundry

- CyberProBono, free security incident response: https://cyberprobono.com
- EatPagosa, a local dining guide: https://eatpagosa.com/about
- StreamPatron, open-source Plex access management: https://streampatron.org

## Links

- Homepage: https://taylorbanks.github.io/page-foundry/
- Source: https://github.com/taylorbanks/page-foundry
- Directory listing: https://skills.sh/taylorbanks/page-foundry

## Facts

- Built by: Taylor Banks
- Platform: Claude Code skill (also a Claude Code plugin, or a .skill upload on claude.ai)
- Install: npx skills add taylorbanks/page-foundry
- Pricing: free, MIT licensed, open source
- Data handling: the one executable is a standard-library Python voice scanner with no network access and no subprocess calls
- Version: v2.6.0
